exchangeRates.title: Exchange rates
exchangeRates.subtitle: Indicative buy, sell, and mid in dram. Major pairs use an aggregated market middle; others follow the same USD/dram level via official reference rates.
exchangeRates.jpyNote: JPY: AMD per 1 yen (reference lists per 10 yen; values are shown per 1 yen).
exchangeRates.error: Could not load rates. Check your connection and try again.

quickAdd.title: Add transaction
quickAdd.ratesError: Could not load FX rates. Switch to AMD or try again in a moment.
quickAdd.hint: Pick a currency, then the amount. Non-AMD amounts are converted to dram using the current reference rates (see the table in Wallet).

dashboard.smartSubtitle: Log income and spending quickly — AMD and Armenian, first.
dashboard.benchmarkHint: When enough anonymized data is available
dashboard.statsNoCategories: Not enough debits yet to show categories — keep logging.
dashboard.statsNoDue: No due items in the upcoming window
dashboard.aiLink: AI assistant — answers use your data

income.title: Stay on track?
income.bodySimple: You recorded {income}. It is saved to the pocket you picked and updates your live balances.

pocket.helpDefault: Where is this money right now?

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptySub: Bill reminders and balance nudges will land here when they are available.

stats.unlockCashflow: Unlock inflow & outflow trends with MonAIQ Plus.
stats.noCategoryYet: Log more debits to see a leader
stats.chartTapHint: Tap a bar to see this day’s spend
stats.cashflowTapHint: Tap the chart to see in & out for a day
stats.coachIntro: Grounded in what you logged — use the Assistant for a tailored plan.
stats.coachNoIncome: You logged spending but almost no income in this window — add income entries so the picture is complete.
stats.coachNegativeNet: Spending exceeded income in this window. Pause non-essentials until inflow catches up.
stats.coachTight: Little margin after outflows — build a small buffer before discretionary buys.
stats.coachSaveFocus: You marked saving as a priority: cap one category, delay low-value purchases, and review subscriptions.
stats.coachSaveAvoid: Avoid stacking large discretionary expenses in the same week.
stats.coachDefault: Keep logging income and spending so this stays accurate.
stats.noShortfall: No projected shortfalls on scheduled notes

auth.loginSubtitle: Green-field intelligence for your money. Secure sign-in.
auth.registerSubtitle: Green-field AI for everyday money. Armenia & AMD first.
auth.loginError: Could not sign in right now.

plans.title: Financial plans
plans.subtitle: Your AI coach reads these with every answer.
plans.empty: No active plans yet. Add a cap or savings goal — the assistant will track them.
plans.pickerHint: Pick what you want the AI to watch.
plans.archiveConfirm: Archive this plan? You can add a new one anytime.

assistant.openFullChatSub: Full screen · personalized to your data
assistant.noChatsYet: No saved chats yet. Open a full chat to start.
assistant.settingsScreenLead: Tune how the coach emphasizes insights in analytics and replies.
assistant.historyLoadError: Could not load this chat. Start a new one or try again.
assistant.title: AI finance coach
assistant.introP: Budget, affordability, past spending, what to pay first. No generic investing advice here.
assistant.suggestedSub: Tap a question in the list
assistant.chatErrorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
assistant.chatErrorServer: The assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
assistant.chatErrorAuth: Sign in is required or your session expired. Open profile and sign in, then try again.
assistant.chatErrorForbidden: You do not have permission to use the assistant with this account.
assistant.chatErrorRequest: The assistant could not process that. Try rephrasing or try again later.
assistant.chatErrorGeneric: Could not get an answer. Please try again.
questions: Can I afford this purchase right now?
How can I save more money this month?
Why does it feel like I am overspending this month?
Can I afford to spend 50,000 AMD this week?
Should I pay loans or rent first?
How much did I spend in the last 30 days?
Will my balance cover upcoming bills?
What are my biggest spending categories?
How does my spending compare to my income this month?
Do I have any payments or debts due soon?
How can I set aside a small safety buffer next month?
Should I focus on paying off debt or on saving first?
Where did most of my money go recently?
Can I still cover rent and utilities with my current balance?
What weekly spending limit would be realistic for me?
How can I reduce non-essential spending without a big lifestyle change?
Based on my data, how is my spending split between cash and card?

quickAction.title: Quick entry
quickAction.subtitle: e.g. kfc 3500
quickAction.micBody: Enable microphone access to use voice input.
quickAction.noRecordingFile: Voice recording did not produce a file.

subscription.subtitleLocked: {feature} is included with a paid plan.

subscription.noPlansHint: Ask your admin to publish subscription plans from the control panel.

appError.title: Something went wrong.
appError.subtitle: The app caught the error and avoided a full crash.
